history.subject: Reduce the tensor-pullback Hilbert leaf to a single standard Stacks fact: prove $f^*(\mathcal F \otimes L^{\otimes m}) \cong f^*\mathcal F \otimes (f^*L)^{\otimes m}$ (Leaf A, pullback_moduleTensorPow_iso) by induction on $m$ from the unit case (pullbackUnitIso, sorry-free) and the binary case, so the only remaining leaf is the unconditional canonical-comparison invertibility $f^*(\mathcal A \otimes \mathcal B) \to f^*\mathcal A \otimes f^*\mathcal B$ (Stacks 01CD, new leaf pullbackTensorMap_isIso). Uses the definitional identity of the section-graded and substrate tensor products to re-type the substrate comparison; pullbackTensorMap and pullbackUnitIso are axiom-clean, so hilbertFunction_quotBaseMap's sorry trail now passes only through pullbackTensorMap_isIso and the Gamma-base-change leaf. New blueprint node lem:pullback_tensor_map_isiso. Full lake build green (8662 jobs).

Projectivity foundation (T14): relative projective space P(n;S) with proper structural morphism and base-change square (axiom-clean); Serre twist O(m) on Proj Z[X] glued from D+(X_i) trivializations with unit transitions (X_i/X_j)^m (C1 proved, C2 cocycle the one named sorry); projective-with-L predicate with properness, closed-immersion composition and base-change stability (proofs complete); Serre finiteness of the section graded module stated as the named deep leaf; blueprint section sec:projective_vocabulary with complete proofs
Anchor lem:sectionGradedModule_fg to its verified Nitsure source
Serre twist O(m): rank-1 pullback cocycle transport, reducing C2 to the overlap-unit fraction identity
Serre-twist cocycle: prove overlapUnit_cocycle_transport, serreTwist now axiom-clean
O(0) transition carries no twist: twistTransition_zero (sign-convention validation)
Serre finiteness: descend projectivity and finite presentation to scheme-theoretic fibres
Serre finiteness → Hilbert polynomial: the graded Hilbert–Serre engine bridge (I-0109)
Projective morphism stability API + O(m) sign validated

Restate Quot-scheme representability faithfully to Nitsure §5 (I-0118): hypotheses are now π projective carrying a relatively very ample L (IsProjectiveWith: closed immersion into ℙ(Fin(d+1);S) over S with L ≅ i*O(1)) and E coherent, at Scheme.{0} — replacing the false-or-open proper-only pin (for merely proper π the Quot functor is in general only an algebraic space, Hironaka counterexample family). Finite type is derived via IsProjectiveWith.locallyOfFiniteType, clearing the overlappingInstances lint. Statement lives in the new leaf Picard/QuotRepresentability.lean (ProjectiveMorphism imports QuotFunctorDef, same split as Grassmannian.representable); the proof stays the single tracked sorry of the Quot endgame.
